codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review of the propagated truth-rails closure confirmed the packet addressed the narrowed PR #96 surface without widening scope: purchase settlement lookups moved off the per-item path in `PurchasingService`, and the linked-reference/audit fixes stayed locked by expanded `InvoiceServiceTest`, `AccountingAuditTrailServiceTest`, `PurchaseResponseMapperTest`, and `PurchasingServiceTest` coverage. Validators remained green on the current branch, so the feature is review-clean on reachable commit `65cd430c80f2e8189a8676cd63cc4291ed0c8752` (`fix(truth-rails): close remaining purchase review blockers`).
